title: Commencement
overview: In isolation his entire life, Nagate must adjust to life in a centuries-old space colony while training as a cadet pilot to fight an ancient threat.

title: Oblivion
overview: Nagate is haunted by his first combat experience against the Gauna. Later, he meets the elite pilots of Sidonia.

title: Glory
overview: Exploring Sidonia, Nagate makes an enemy of Kunato while protecting a friend. The Gauna attack, calling the pilots into action.

title: Sacrifices
overview: After a disaster aboard Sidonia, Nagate and his team are ordered to retrieve a valued weapon. He later defies orders to save a friend.

title: Adrift
overview: Nagate and Shizuka, adrift in space, slowly run out of supplies as they await rescue from a departing Sidonia, which is too far away to send help.

title: Salutations
overview: Nagate and his squad graduate as pilots and are quickly sent into combat when the enemy returns; Kunato explores Nagate's history.

title: Resolve
overview: The enemy is revealed to be even larger and deadlier than previously believed, resulting in three squads engaging in a deadly fight.

title: Immortality
overview: Nagate is blamed for a defeat and harbors guilt over a casualty; the early years of Sidonia are revealed.

title: Empathy
overview: The Gauna find a distressing way to demoralize and out-fight the attack force. Nagate returns to Sidonia with a prize that may help in the fight.

title: Decisions
overview: Pacifists endanger themselves by leaving the relative safety of Sidonia, while the enemy shows up larger and fiercer than before.

title: Collision
overview: A large strike force encounters an enemy unit that takes them by surprise; Nagate does what he can to protect his friends.

title: Home
overview: Nagate fights one-on-one with the heart of his enemy while the strike force does not fare well in its attack on the Gauna.

title: Conflict
overview: Pilot Nagate Tanikaze is now renowned for his actions in the recent battle, but Nagate is more concerned with the disappearance of the ena Hoshijiro.

title: Ability
overview: Nagate and his team fight a hard battle against Gauna 549, aided by the appearance of a new type of gauna calling itself Tsumugi Shiraui.

title: Course
overview: Having disposed of the opposition, Kobayashi sets Sidonia's course to the ninth planet in the nearby Lem System. All-out war now seems unavoidable.

title: Rage
overview: A new threat appears in the form of Gauna 550, which has ejected countless lesser gauna cores on an intercept trajectory with Sidonia.

title: Hope
overview: Despite being instrumental in their victory, Tsumugi is severely damaged defending Sidonia. Izana, also critically injured, makes a bold decision.

title: Engage
overview: Evicted from his dorm and with nowhere to go, Nagate asks to stay with Izana for a night; Tsumugi has an emotional crisis triggered by a close call.

title: Rumbling
overview: The Sidonia's new weapon test succeeds, but the crew realizes they can't shut it down; Yuhata sends the garde pilots to investigate the disturbance.

title: Reunion
overview: The pilots and Tsumugi repair damage to the Sidonia following the Gravitational Beam Emitter incident; Tsumugi is upset for causing a minor accident.

title: Mission
overview: Izana finds out her 'date' with Nagate was a setup and storms home. Soon after, she is called to be part of a team that will scout out Planet Nine.

title: Entry
overview: The reconnaissance team is attacked by the gauna; Izana and the squad leader manage to escape into the atmosphere of Planet Nine.

title: Encounter
overview: Izana and the recon squad leader are pursued by an enormous humanoid gauna. Meanwhile, Tsumugi faces off against the Crimson Hawk Moth.

title: Battle
overview: Nagate rescues Tsumugi but is overpowered by the Crimson Hawk Moth. The situation looks grim as swarms of gauna bear down on the survivors.
